title: Plan and implement a harvest and pre-processing program for medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement a harvest and pre-processing program for medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine harvest and pre-processing requirements for medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Identify and confirm cultivation and production specifications with senior personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm cultivation and production specifications with senior personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm cultivation and production specifications with senior personnel.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine space requirements for the program, including any parameters that impact on manual handling.
